== S0: field self-tests ==
  all pass (i^2, phi^2, sqrt5^2, C10^2, w5^5)

== S2: F1, F2 exact q-expansions (YLD Eqs. (12),(88),(93); accessed 2026-07-17) ==
  [Eq. (93) verbatim] F1 eta^{3/5} = q^{1/40} sum (-1)^m q^{(5m^2+m)/2},
                      F2 eta^{3/5} = q^{9/40} sum (-1)^m q^{(5m^2+3m)/2}
  => F1 = N1/(q;q)^{3/5},  F2 = q^{1/5} N2/(q;q)^{3/5}  (exact)
  G1 (JTP): N1 == (q2;q5)(q3;q5)(q5;q5) and N2 == (q;q5)(q4;q5)(q5;q5) to O(q^400): True
  G2 (phi-form): A == (q;q)^(2/5)/((q;q5)(q4;q5)), B == (q;q)^(2/5)/((q2;q5)(q3;q5)): True
  G3 row1 (F1^5+2F2^5)      : computed [1, 5, 0, 10, -5, 5] vs printed [1, 5, 0, 10, -5, 5]: True
  G3 row2 (2F1^5-F2^5)      : computed [2, 5, 10, 0, 5, 5] vs printed [2, 5, 10, 0, 5, 5]: True
  G3 row3 series of F1^4F2  : computed [1, 2, 2, 1, 2, 2] vs printed [1, 2, 2, 1, 2, 2]: True
  G3 row4 series of F1^3F2^2: computed [1, 1, 1, 1, 2, 0, 1] vs printed [1, 1, 1, 1, 2, 0, 1]: True
  G3 row5 series of F1^2F2^3: computed [1, 0, 1, 1, 1, -1] vs printed [1, 0, 1, 1, 1, -1]: True
  G3 row6 series of F1F2^4  : computed [1, -1, 2, 0, 0, 0, 2, -2] vs printed [1, -1, 2, 0, 0, 0, 2, -2]: True
  G3 (YLD Eq. 99, all six rows, exact): True
  F1 stream (30+ terms): [1, 3/5, 2/25, -28/125, 264/625, 532/15625, 20916/78125, -88416/390625, -271216/1953125, 3055623/9765625, -26495988/244140625, 257066076/1220703125, 1328631264/6103515625, -1906866201/30517578125, -26198339982/152587890625, 11794844628/3814697265625, 2129328417699/19073486328125, -11818346720179/95367431640625, 48576688602576/476837158203125, 145686259624392/2384185791015625, 19329253210514024/59604644775390625, -45228978870361993/298023223876953125, 136115197063351308/1490116119384765625, -438035911240116132/7450580596923828125, -5093641755872637264/37252902984619140625, 873833408628248897268/4656612873077392578125, -3448586052440407995296/23283064365386962890625, -7169853969973395831564/116415321826934814453125, 44276258824566566928096/582076609134674072265625, 241727487669379004709752/2910383045673370361328125, 7150804334059486548014846/72759576141834259033203125, 43139265598884390194119548/363797880709171295166015625, -15354406279966310300450198/1818989403545856475830078125, 825970349864928547739468052/9094947017729282379150390625, -7050242391685490689017427506/45474735088646411895751953125, 58592898409502270511820960796/1136868377216160297393798828125, 361582226259776338745400424008/5684341886080801486968994140625, -1987735221248377008613731935313/28421709430404007434844970703125, -2554593200925050996034890459508/142108547152020037174224853515625, -82874161187283734784933797231056/710542735760100185871124267578125, 2212364584751725786747629701184/17763568394002504646778106689453125, -1770792793165131445540361953884303/88817841970012523233890533447265625]
